body:
## SAFE-19 from Safety Audit 2026-04-05

**Severity**: MEDIUM (downgraded from report LOW — this is a Vulkan spec violation) | **Dimension**: Vulkan Spec

\`update_rgba\` rewrites ALL descriptor sets (all swapchain images) simultaneously (texture_registry.rs:262-278). An in-flight command buffer may reference a set that was just rewritten. The old image is still alive (pending_destroy) so no GPU fault, but the update races with in-flight usage per VUID-vkUpdateDescriptorSets-None-03047.

**Fix**: Only update the current frame's descriptor set; update others when their fence signals.
title: Safety: update_rgba descriptor set writes race with in-flight command buffers
